Seedance 2.0 on Picsart

I don’t know about you, but I’m from the generation that used to run home from school just to catch Power Rangers on TV 😭 so the fact I could make a full 1 minute Bollywood version in 3 days is actually crazy.

Made with Seedance 2.0 and yeah, it’s goat. Not a magic wand though. Still took a lot of generations, experimenting, post production, and editing. But yeah, this is next level.

Hollywood spends years and millions to build timelines. One prompt just did it in minutes.

This isn't a studio trailer. It's a complete time-travel sequence generated entirely inside Picsart Flow, powered by Seedance 2.0.

From salt flats to future skylines, then straight into the Jurassic era. Zero VFX teams. Zero render farms. Just a single cloud workflow executing what used to take a department of fifty.

The barrier between imagination and execution just collapsed.

Comment "Picsart" to get the workflow.
